news.headline: Global Gas Pressure Regulator Market projected to reach US$4.09 billion by 2034, with East Asia leading at 26.9% market share.
news.summary: A study by Fact.MR reveals that the global Gas Pressure Regulator Market is expected to reach US$ 2.84 billion in 2024, with a projected increase at a CAGR of 3.7% from 2024 to 2034. The growth is fueled by the oil and gas industry's continuous production and exploration activities, necessitating reliable pressure management systems. This sector's focus on advanced extraction technology and infrastructure highlights the importance of gas pressure regulators in maintaining safe and efficient operations. The rising demand for these systems is crucial for ensuring safety standards, regulatory compliance, and enhanced production. Market expansion is driven by East Asia's growing manufacturing sector and increased reliance on natural gas, with the region expected to lead with a 26.9% market share in 2024. North America's market is also expanding due to higher natural gas consumption in various sectors. By 2034, the global market for gas pressure regulators is estimated to reach US$ 4.09 billion, with East Asia leading and North America projected to reach US$ 960.7 million. Notably, demand for single-stage gas pressure regulators in Japan is expected to grow at a 3.9% CAGR from 2024 to 2034, with China holding a significant portion of the East Asia market at 47.9% in 2024.

news.headline: PermRock Royalty Trust (NYSE:PRT) declares monthly cash distribution to Trust Units holders, payable on Nov 15, 2024.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, in Dallas, PermRock Royalty Trust (NYSE:PRT) announced a monthly cash distribution for record holders of its trust units, representing beneficial interests in the Trust. This distribution will be available to those holding Trust Units as of October 31, 2024. The payment is scheduled for November 15, 2024.

news.headline: Primo Water (NYSE: PRMW) sets date for Q3 2024 earnings release & Special Meeting of Shareowners. Tampa & Stamford Oct. 21.
news.summary: In Tampa, Florida and Stamford, Connecticut, on October 21, 2024, Primo Water Corporation (NYSE: PRMW) (TSX: PRMW) disclosed the schedule for its Q3 2024 earnings report and revealed information regarding the Special Meeting of Shareowners.

news.headline: Hyperscale Data pays 28 consecutive monthly cash dividend payments for Series D Preferred Stock.
news.summary: Hyperscale Data has recently confirmed timely payment of cash dividends for the 28th consecutive month for its Series D Preferred Stock. This consistency signifies the company’s commitment to shareholders, ensuring a steady stream of payments to investors who hold this preferred stock.

news.headline: Parsons is acquiring BCC Engineering to enhance its infrastructure capabilities in the Southeast U.S.
news.summary: The recent acquisition has significantly bolstered Parsons' infrastructure capabilities in the Southeastern region of the United States. This move is aimed at strengthening the company's presence in the area and expanding its operations. With this strategic decision, Parsons aims to capitalize on the growing infrastructure market in the Southeast U.S. and enhance its services to better cater to the increasing demand in the region. This acquisition is expected to bring in substantial benefits for Parsons and position them as a key player in the infrastructure sector.

news.headline: Scandinavian Tobacco Group A/S reports transactions related to share buy-back program.
Bilibili Inc. will repurchase 0.50% Convertible Senior Notes due 2026, allowing holders to exercise Repurchase Right.
news.summary: Bilibili Inc., a prominent video community for young generations in China, has informed holders of its 0.50% Convertible Senior Notes due 2026 (CUSIP No. 090040AF3) about their option to request the repurchase of their Notes. Each holder can choose to have the Company buy back all or a multiple of US$1,000 principal amount of their Notes for cash on December 1, 2024. This option, known as the "Repurchase Right," is outlined in the Indenture dated November 23, 2021, between Bilibili and Deutsche Bank Trust Company Americas. Holders can exercise this right starting from 12:01 a.m. on Tuesday, October 29, 2024, until 5:00 p.m. on Wednesday, November 27, 2024.

news.headline: Revyse secures $1 million investment from RET Ventures, totaling $2 million in venture funding. Modern vendor management.
news.summary: In Bend, Oregon, Revyse, a vendor management software tailored for the multifamily sector, revealed the completion of a $1 million seed funding round from real estate tech VC firm RET Ventures. Following a previous $1 million raise in May, this additional funding marks a significant milestone for the company. Founded in 2023 by industry experts Bobbi Steward and Ben Steward, Revyse aims to revolutionize and simplify vendor management processes in the rental real estate industry.

news.headline: Concerns of premature Fed exit causing uncertainty in emerging markets as they stand on shaky ground.
Argus launches daily low-sulphur diesel price assessments in west Africa, increasing transparency in a region of rising production and trade.
news.summary: In London on October 21, 2024, the renowned energy and commodity price reporting agency, Argus, introduced its inaugural daily price evaluations for low-sulphur diesel in West Africa. This significant move aims to provide transparency in a region witnessing a swift increase in domestic production and trade. This initiative will play a crucial role in offering valuable insights into the market dynamics in West Africa for stakeholders, reflecting the escalating importance of the area in the global energy and commodity sectors.

news.headline: Ferrari N.V. bought Euro 250 million in common shares as part of a Euro 2 billion buyback program expected by 2026.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, Ferrari N.V. revealed that it has bought back Euro 250 million worth of common shares as part of its ongoing share repurchase program. This marks the fifth tranche of a larger program totaling around Euro 2 billion set to be completed by 2026. The company had initially announced this initiative during the 2022 Capital Markets Day. The specific number of additional common shares acquired was not disclosed, but the transactions were carried out daily on the Euronext Milan (EXM) stock exchange.

news.headline: Emirates orders 5 more Boeing 777 Freighters, totaling 249 widebody aircraft orders; plans to double freighter fleet to 21.
news.summary: Boeing Company's (NYSE: BA) premarket shares surged as they announced receiving another order from Emirates SkyCargo for five additional 777 Freighters, in addition to the previous five. This latest order, finalized in September, brings Emirates' total widebody aircraft orders from Boeing to 249, which includes a total of 14 777 Freighters. Emirates SkyCargo is looking to boost its fleet of 777 Freighters to 21 from the current 11, aiming to almost double its capacity in the upcoming years. The 777 Freighter is known for its exceptional features, with a range of 9,200 kilometers and a capacity of 102 tonnes, making it the cargo jet with the longest range and highest capacity in the twin-engine category.

news.headline: EPC Group reaches 5,200 SharePoint implementations and 1,500 Microsoft Power BI projects globally. A major achievement.
news.summary: In Houston on October 21, 2024, EPC Group revealed that it has completed more than 5,200 SharePoint deployments and 1,500 Microsoft Power BI projects globally. As the second oldest Microsoft Gold Partner in North America, these achievements highlight the company's expertise and extensive experience in these technologies.

news.headline: Tutor Perini Corp (NYSE: TPC) updates on recent developments incl. settlements, new projects driving cash collections.
news.summary: In Los Angeles, Tutor Perini Corporation (NYSE: TPC), a prominent construction company, shared updates on recent developments. The company settled multiple project-related disputes, yielding mixed outcomes. However, due to expected cash inflow from these settlements and other ongoing projects, including new awards, the company anticipates positive financial implications. The settlements, alongside new project activities, are projected to boost the company's overall financial standing.

news.headline: Construction Partners, Inc. reveals preliminary Fiscal 2024 results and Fiscal 2025 outlook in Dothan, Alabama.
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, in Dothan, Alabama, Construction Partners, Inc. (NASDAQ: ROAD), a fully integrated civil infrastructure firm that focuses on building and managing roadways in six southeastern states, shared initial information.

news.headline: Vladimir Putin's influence in Europe is growing as division widens.
Keepit will be at Gartner 2024 conferences in the Americas and Europe to discuss data governance and disaster recovery.
news.summary: In Copenhagen, Denmark, Keepit, a worldwide supplier of a full cloud backup and recovery platform, revealed its participation in the upcoming 2024 Gartner IT Symposium/Xpo™ and Gartner IOCS conferences in the Americas and Europe this autumn. During these events, the Keepit team will discuss strategies for enhancing resilience via robust data governance frameworks. They will emphasize the importance of diligent analysis for securing business continuity and resilience in the face of challenges.

news.headline: Rönesans Holding secures funding for Türkiye's Northern Marmara Motorway Project, improving east-west road links in Istanbul.
news.summary: The construction of a motorway project in Istanbul is set to transform the city's east-west road links, creating a new corridor connecting the Asian and European sides. This development will provide the city center with convenient access to Istanbul Airport. The project is anticipated to establish a new standard for sustainable infrastructure in Turkey.

news.headline: ComplyControl, a tech solutions provider for banks, undergoes a successful redesign for innovative compliance services.
news.summary: In London, on October 21, 2024, ComplyControl, a service provider for banks focusing on advanced technology solutions, has recently completed a successful overhaul that includes a redesigned website and updated corporate branding. The fresh look of the website aims to enhance user experience with its minimalist design.

news.headline: JinkoSolar's subsidiary to offer up to 1 billion A shares in GDR form on Frankfurt Stock Exchange in Germany.
news.summary: In Shangrao, China on October 21, 2024, JinkoSolar Holding Co., Ltd. (NYSE: JKS) revealed that Jiangxi Jinko, a majority-owned subsidiary, has made significant strides. JinkoSolar is a leading global producer of solar modules known for its innovation and scale.

news.headline: Black Mass Recycling Market projected to reach $51.70 billion by 2032, focusing on various battery types and recycling processes.
news.summary: In Delray Beach, Florida, on October 21, 2024, a recent study was released on the Black Mass Recycling Market. The report focuses on various aspects such as Battery Type including Lithium-Ion and Nickel, Battery Source which includes Automotive, Consumer Electronics, Power, and Marine sectors. The Recycling Process examined in the report includes Pyro and Hydro methods. The recovered metals highlighted in the study are Nickel, Cobalt, Lithium, and Copper. The analysis covers different regions and market trends related to these aspects.

news.headline: Great American Media announces "God's Not Dead: In God We Trust" as the most successful faith franchise, exclusive on Pure Flix from November 1. Starring David A.R. White, Isaiah Washington, Dean Cain, and more.
news.summary: Featuring popular actors David A.R. White, Isaiah Washington, Dean Cain, Samaire Armstrong, Ray Wise, Charlene Tilton, and Scott Baio, with a special appearance by Newsboys, the 5th installment of an exciting project was announced by Great American Media on October 21, 2024. This news marks another milestone in the journey of the production company known for promoting values of faith, family, and patriotism.

news.headline: Realta Wealth expands leadership team, appoints Abbey Eastham as Head of Advisor Relations from Cetera. CEO: Kevin Keefe.
news.summary: A highly experienced wealth management professional, Abbey Eastham, has joined Realta Wealth from Cetera. Realta Wealth, an independent wealth management firm based in Wilmington, Del., revealed the news on October 21, 2024. Eastham will assume the role of Head of Advisor Relations and will report directly to CEO Kevin Keefe. This strategic appointment signifies an important move for Realta Wealth as they continue to strengthen their team to enhance their services.

news.headline: Construction Partners, Inc. will acquire Lone Star Paving in Austin, Texas for $654 million in cash and 3 million shares. Transaction to close in Q1FY25, accelerate ROAD-Map 2027 goals.
news.summary: In a significant development, CPI has announced its acquisition of Lone Star Paving based in Austin, Texas, for a substantial sum of $654 million in cash along with 3 million shares. The transaction is anticipated to be immediately beneficial to earnings upon closing, which is projected to take place in the first quarter of the financial year 2025. This transformative deal is expected to play a crucial role in accelerating CPI's ambitious ROAD-Map 2027 objectives. Furthermore, this acquisition is set to bring about various advantages and enhancements to CPI's operations.

news.headline: Titan International, Inc. buys back 8 million shares from MHR Fund Management for $57.6 million ($7.20/share).
news.summary: On October 21, 2024, Titan International, Inc. disclosed that it successfully bought back 8.0 million common shares from MHR Fund Management at a price of $7.20 per share, totaling $57.6 million in cash. The transaction involved Mark Rachesky, the head of MHR Fund Management and a member of Titan International.

news.headline: Cigna Healthcare invests $600,000 to address food insecurity in seniors, funds support 54 organizations.
news.summary: 54 different community-based organizations in Bloomfield, Connecticut have recently been granted a total of $600,000 by Cigna Healthcare, a subsidiary of The Cigna Group listed on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol CI. The funds are designated to assist in meeting the dietary requirements of older adults residing in the area. This initiative aims to support the well-being of seniors through the resources and services provided by these organizations.

news.headline: Panera's MyPanera Week offers free meal reward for spending $10, celebrating loyalty members. #PaneraBread #MyPaneraWeek
news.summary: Starting from today, Panera Bread is launching MyPanera Week in St. Louis, as per the announcement made on Oct. 21, 2024. Customers who spend $10 or more in a single visit during this promotional event will receive a reward for a free Panera meal with their next order valued at $10 or more. This exciting week is dedicated to celebrating the loyalty of Panera Bread's valued members.

news.headline: Leonard A. Lauder receives Neiman Marcus Award for Distinguished Service in Fashion in 2024.
news.summary: Neiman Marcus, the integrated luxury retailer, has announced that Leonard A. Lauder, the Chairman Emeritus of The Estée Lauder Companies (ELC), will be honored for his remarkable career and commitment to philanthropy. The event will take place in Dallas on October 21, 2024.

news.headline: Open Mainframe Project introduces Zorse and zopen community to enhance productivity for mainframers using AI and open source.
news.summary: Two new initiatives, Zorse and Zopen Community, have been launched to enhance productivity for mainframe users. The Open Mainframe Project, a collaborative open-source effort, is spearheading these projects. Zorse and Zopen aim to facilitate shared tool development and foster collaboration within the mainframe community. The announcement was made at IBM TechXchange in Las Vegas on Oct. 21, 2024. These initiatives are set to benefit a significant number of mainframe users and are expected to result in increased efficiency and innovation within the community.

news.headline: Voters appeal to Trump's tariffs. Beware of the impact.

Global Cryogenic Ethylene Market to grow at 9.2% CAGR, hitting US$13,760.3 million by 2034. North America holds 5% share in 2024. Key focus on polyethylene demand, technological advancements, and R&D for speciality chemicals and materials. Big players compete on product quality, price, and distribution.
news.summary: The Global Cryogenic Ethylene Market is expected to reach US$ 5,706.9 million in 2024, with a projected growth rate of 9.2% from 2024 to 2034, reaching US$ 13,760.3 million by 2034. The market growth is primarily driven by the increasing demand for polyethylene, a versatile plastic used in various industries. Technological advancements in cryogenic storage and transportation have made ethylene more accessible globally, leading to research and development for new applications in specialty chemicals and materials. The competitive landscape is dominated by a few key players focusing on product quality, pricing, and distribution networks. North America is estimated to hold a market share of 5% in 2024, with polymer production expected to create a significant opportunity in the market. North America and East Asia are projected to contribute a combined absolute $ opportunity of US$ 4,633.0 million.

news.headline: Anaergia to provide organic waste infrastructure at Riverside, California. Subsidiary to install equipment at RWQCP.
news.summary: Anaergia Inc. revealed that its subsidiary, Anaergia Technologies, LLC, signed a contract with the City of Riverside, California, to set up infrastructure at the Riverside Water Quality Control Plant. This deal allows for the acceptance of organic municipal waste from nearby solid waste collection firms. Anaergia, traded on the TSX as ANRG, shared this update without specifying further details about the contract.

news.headline: First patient dosed in Zymeworks' Phase 1 trial of ZW171 for advanced cancer; focuses on ovarian, NSCLC, MSLN cancers.
news.summary: In Vancouver, British Columbia, Zymeworks Inc. (Nasdaq: ZYME) disclosed that they have commenced the first-in-human Phase 1 trial (NCT06523803) for their investigational therapy ZW171. The trial's objective is to assess the safety and tolerability of ZW171 in patients with advanced or metastatic ovarian cancer, NSCLC, and other MSLN-expressing cancers. This marks a significant milestone for the clinical-stage biotechnology company, which aims to enhance the standard of care for challenging-to-treat diseases. The trial has successfully dosed its first patient, signaling a critical step forward in this groundbreaking research.

news.headline: FII Institute reveals lineup & program details for FII8 Conference in Riyadh from Oct 28-31, 2024.
news.summary: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, the Future Investment Initiative (FII) Institute has unveiled the notable speakers and complete agenda for the upcoming FII8 Conference. Scheduled to occur from October 28-31, 2024, at the renowned King...

news.headline: Tower Semiconductor will release its third quarter 2024 financial results on Nov 13, 2024, followed by a conference call at 10am Eastern Time.
news.summary: An Israel-based semiconductor foundry company, Tower Semiconductor (NASDAQ/ TASE: TSEM), known for its high-value analog solutions, is set to announce its third quarter 2024 earnings on November 13, 2024. The financial results and guidance for the fourth quarter of 2024 will be discussed in a conference call scheduled for the same day at 10:00 a.m. Eastern Time (09:00 a.m. Central, 08:00 a.m. Mountain, 07:00 a.m. Pacific, and 05:00 p.m. Israel time).

news.headline: Grab will announce Q3 2024 results on Nov 12, after the US market closes. Stay tuned for updates on their financial performance.
news.summary: Grab Holdings Limited (NASDAQ: GRAB) intends to release its unaudited third quarter results for 2024 after the U.S. market closes on November 12, 2024.

news.headline: Bruker announces $100 deep, high-accuracy plasma proteome advancement at HUPO World Congress.
news.summary: In Dresden, Germany, Bruker Corporation (Nasdaq: BRKR) unveiled advancements in deep, unbiased, and high-sensitivity 4D-Proteomics at the 23rd Human Proteome Organization World Congress. These developments aim to facilitate robust, high-fidelity, large-scale studies without the typical cross-talk associated with affinity high-plex technologies. The innovation involves enhanced specificity and proteome coverage through the utilization of diagonal-PASEF, a technique introduced in 2023. Diagonal-PASEF harnesses scanning quadrupole and trapped ion mobility spectrometry (TIMS) to achieve improved results in proteomic analysis.

news.headline: Sandy Spring Bancorp Q3 earnings $16.2M ($0.36/share), down from $22.8M in Q2 2024 and $20.7M in Q3 2023.
news.summary: In Olney, Maryland, on October 21, 2024, Sandy Spring Bancorp, Inc. (Nasdaq-SASR), the holding company of Sandy Spring Bank, disclosed a net income of $16.2 million ($0.36 per diluted common share) for the quarter that finished on September 30, 2024. This figure shows a decrease compared to the second quarter of the same year, which reported a net income of $22.8 million ($0.51 per diluted common share), and the third quarter of 2023, which recorded a net income of $20.7 million ($0.46 per diluted common share).

news.headline: SunHydrogen progressing towards 1m² pilot demo of green hydrogen panels using sunlight and water.
news.summary: In Coralville, Iowa, on October 21, 2024, SunHydrogen, Inc. (OTCQB: HYSR) provided an update on its innovative technology for generating renewable hydrogen from sunlight and water. The company is moving forward with plans to showcase its green hydrogen panels on a commercially significant 1m² scale.

news.headline: Investcorp AI Acquisition Corp. will merge with Bigtincan Holdings Ltd., forming "Bigtincan Limited" with a $275m valuation.
news.summary: Investcorp AI Acquisition Corp. (IAAC) has recently disclosed an agreement with Bigtincan Holdings Limited (Bigtincan) which involves a potential merger and listing on the Nasdaq through a new entity named "Bigtincan Limited." The proposed transaction carries an implied pre-money equity valuation of Bigtincan amounting to US$275 million on a fully diluted basis. IAAC is listed as IVCA on the Nasdaq, while Bigtincan is traded as BTH on the ASX.

news.headline: Highwoods Properties, Inc. (NYSE:HIW) declares $0.50 quarterly dividend per share of common stock, annualized $2.00. Payable on Dec 10.
news.summary: Highwoods Properties, Inc. based in Raleigh, N.C., declared a cash dividend of $0.50 per share of common stock for the quarter ended September 30, 2024. The annualized dividend amounts to $2.00 per share. The dividend is set to be paid on December 10, 2024, to shareholders of record as of November 18, 2024. HIW stockholders will receive the quarterly dividend, reflecting the company's commitment to rewarding its investors.

news.headline: Orbbec introduces Gemini 335Lg 3D camera for AMRs and robotic arms, improving performance in tough environments.
news.summary: Orbbec, a global company based in Odense, Denmark, has introduced the Gemini 335Lg, a cutting-edge device equipped with a GMSL2 serializer and FAKRA connector. This innovative technology is aimed at improving the connectivity for autonomous mobile robots (AMRs) and robotic arms. The product is designed to operate effectively in challenging environments. The release of the Gemini 335Lg was announced on October 21, 2024, marking a significant advancement in the field.

news.headline: Sandvik reported an order intake of SEK 28.8 billion, revenues of SEK 30.3 billion, and adjusted EBITA of SEK 5.9 billion in Q3 2024.
news.summary: In Stockholm on October 21, 2024, it was reported that the order intake stood at SEK 28,796 million, showing a slight decrease from the previous period but increasing by 4% at fixed exchange rates. Revenues amounted to SEK 30,306 million, with revenue growth increasing by 1% at fixed exchange rates. The adjusted EBITA was SEK 5,866 million, lower than the previous figure of SEK 6,312 million.

news.headline: Naqdi sponsors World Trade Centre Metro station in Dubai, making a bold statement in UAE market.
news.summary: In Dubai, UAE, on October 21, 2024, Naqdi, a pioneering STP broker, has announced its exclusive sponsorship of the World Trade Centre (WTC) Metro station. This strategic decision goes beyond a mere branding initiative, showcasing Naqdi's innovative strategy in the region.

news.headline: Scholz reiterates that Germany opposes EU tariffs on Chinese EV's.
Biden plans to increase free birth control access as election approaches.
Trump doubles down on fearmongering tactics in attempt to secure voter support. Will his strategy pay off?
Genethon to present latest gene therapy advancements at ESGCT Congress in Rome Oct 22-25, 2024, aiming to transform patients' lives.
news.summary: In Paris, groundbreaking developments from Genethon in gene therapy have been unveiled. These advancements encompass scientific and medical breakthroughs that could potentially revolutionize the lives of patients.

news.headline: Oral semaglutide reduces major cardiovascular risk by 14% for type 2 diabetes patients in SOUL trial with 9,650 participants.
news.summary: Novo Nordisk from Bagsværd, Denmark, shared the key findings from the SOUL cardiovascular outcomes trial on 21 October 2024. This trial, which was double-blinded and randomised, investigated the effectiveness of oral semaglutide compared to a placebo in addition to standard care in preventing major adverse cardiovascular events (MACE). The study involved a total of 9,650 participants diagnosed with type 2 diabetes and either cardiovascular disease (CVD) or chronic kidney disease (CKD). Notably, during the trial, 49% of patients received SGLT2i as part of their standard treatment.

news.headline: Florida billionaire purchases 5% of major US newspaper company, aims to acquire entire company.
news.summary: David Hoffmann has purchased a 5% stake in one of the United States' major newspaper companies and is now aiming to acquire the entirety of the company.
